---
title: "Software & Data"
---

## Research code

Selected code and replication materials related to my research.

## Teaching materials

Slides, assignments, datasets, and examples for economics and statistics courses.

## Stata

- Mapping and geographic visualization
- Regression and table-export workflows
- Data cleaning utilities

## R

- Data visualization
- Reproducible examples
- Teaching demonstrations

## LaTeX

- Beamer templates
